title: 5pcs Car Cleaning Brush Set, Ultra Soft Hair Car Dust Sweeping Soft Bristle Brush, Boars Car Detailing brushes, Microfiber Car Interior Brush for Cleaning Interior/Exterior of Car
features: 【Car Detailing Brushes Set]】Include 5 car interior cleaning brushes that different heads are designed for specific areas of the car meeting your cleaning needs, making it an essential addition to your car care routine.

【Material】The car cleaning brush interior are made of PET, PPT and boars hair material, and the hair is prevented from falling off, and it has excellent hair quality, high toughness, light weight and durability.

【Versatile Cleaning】1pcs Boars hair brush car detailing for cleaning both exterior and wheel and more, 1pcs Sharpened Bristles Brush for dusting crack in the seat and exhaust vent , 1pcs Microfiber Soft Brush for dusting leather surfaces and handles, 2pcs Ultra Soft Brushes brushes for cleaning screens and dashboards, perfect for cleaning every nook and cranny of your vehicle, Great for cleaning every corner of your car.

【Ergonomic Design】Automotive interior dusting brush kit design built with comfortable grip handle allows for easy maneuvering, making it effortless to reach tight spaces or areas that are difficult to Clean.

【Wide Applications】The car duster brushes are perfect for cleaning both the interior and exterior of various vehicles, including screens, panels, vents, engines and seat gaps, can also be used for house cleaning, keyboard and mouse, sofa, air conditioner, etc. to give you a damage-free cleaning experience.

The bristles of the sharpened bristle brush are slightly hard and have a narrow diameter.
